title: Hanoi Summit: The Start of Real Negotiations?
summary: In the aftermath of the Hanoi Summit, the Belfer Center convened aHarvard Korea Working Group Speaker Series event to assess summit outcomes.
body: In the aftermath of the Hanoi Summit, the Belfer Center convened a Harvard Korea Working Group Speaker Series event to assess summit outcomes. This event took place on Thursday, February 28th. The latest from Belfer See more Panelists: Reid Pauly (Research Fellow, HKS) – Moderator Gary Samore (Co-Chair, Korean Security Study Group, HKS) John Park (Director, Korea Project, HKS) Katharine Moon (Wasserman Professor of Asian Studies, Wellesley College & Nonresident Senior Fellow, Brookings Institution) William Tobey (Co-Chair, Korean Security Study Group, HKS) This Harvard Korea Working Group Speaker Series event was co-sponsored by the Belfer Center's Korea Project and the SBS Foundation Research Fund at Harvard University's Korea Institute. The Harvard Korea Working Group acknowledges the generous support of the Korea Foundation. Hanoi Summit: The Start of Real Negotiations? _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: Following the Hanoi Summit, the Belfer Center's Harvard Korea Working Group held a speaker series event on February 28th to analyze the summit's outcomes. The panel, moderated by Reid Pauly, featured experts Gary Samore, John Park, Katharine Moon, and William Tobey. The discussion centered on whether the summit marked the beginning of substantive negotiations regarding North Korea's nuclear program. The event was co-sponsored by the Belfer Center's Korea Project and the SBS Foundation Research Fund, with support from the Korea Foundation. The analysis provided insights into the complex diplomatic landscape and the challenges of denuclearization talks on the Korean Peninsula.
result.main_content_zh: 河内峰会结束后，贝尔弗科学与国际事务中心的哈佛韩国工作组于2月28日举办了一场演讲系列活动，旨在评估峰会成果。本次会议由里德·保利主持，专家组成员包括加里·萨莫尔、约翰·帕克、凯瑟琳·穆恩和威廉·托比。讨论的核心议题是此次峰会是否标志着围绕朝鲜核计划的实质性谈判的开始。此次活动由贝尔弗中心的韩国项目与哈佛大学韩国研究所的SBS基金会研究基金共同赞助，并得到了韩国基金会的支持。专家们的分析深入探讨了朝鲜半岛无核化谈判所面临的复杂外交形势与挑战。
